0.details:
My best friend
Been friends since we were little kids
I am excited that we are celebrating this moment together
Congratulations for achieving this milestone
I wish you all the best
0.model_generation: Today, as we stand together celebrating this special day, I am filled with endless joy. From mud-streaked afternoons in backyard forts to late-night heart-to-hearts over coffee, we've shared laughter, secrets, and dreams since we were little kids. Your kindness and unwavering loyalty have shaped me more than you’ll ever know. Watching you grow into the remarkable person you are today has been an honor. I feel incredibly proud of everything you’ve accomplished and all the ways you’ve grown. Congratulations on achieving this milestone and all the moments that brought you here. I admire your courage, your generosity, and the way you light up every room. May this year be filled with new adventures, boundless happiness, and dreams coming true. I wish you all the best as you embark on the next chapter of your journey. Here’s to many more years of friendship, laughter, and unforgettable memories. Happy birthday!
0.final_version: My best friend. I am so happy for you, my friend. We have been friends since we were friends, and we have grown together. As you are getting married today, I want you to know that I am proud of the person you have become. Having you by my side has been amazing and I have enjoyed every single moment. I am excited that we are celebrating this moment together. Congratulations for achieving this milestone that you have always dreamt of. I know how much you have always wanted to be a wife and it is happening. I wish you all the best in your marriage and I pray that it will last forever. I wish you goodness and prosperity in your marriage and I hope you and your partner will treat each other with respect and love. Always know that I love you and I will always have your back no matter what.

1.details:
My cousin
I am deeply sorry for your loss
May the lord comfort you in this difficult time
I am praying for you
You are in my thoughts
I can be youe shoulder to cry on
1.model_generation:
Dear Cousin,

I was heartbroken to hear about your loss. I am deeply sorry for your suffering and the pain you must be feeling. May the Lord comfort you in this difficult time, surround you with His peace and strength, and give you hope for tomorrow. Please know you are in my thoughts and prayers every day as you navigate these painful moments. I hope you feel God’s loving presence carrying you forward, and know I am lifting you up in prayer. May you find comfort in the memories you shared and strength in the love that surrounds you.

If you need someone to talk with, lean on, or simply sit beside you in silence, I am here for you. You can count on me as your shoulder to cry on. Your grief is shared, and together we will find solace in cherished memories.

With love and sympathy,  
Your cousin
1.final_version: Dear beloved cousin. I am deeply sorry for your loss. Know that you are in my prayers. May the good Lord comfort you in this difficult time and heal your bleeding heart. I know that words cannot take away the pain that you are feeling of losing your father but take them as a comforting pillow. You are in my thoughts, and I want you to know that you can reach out to me if you need anything. I can be your shoulder to cry on if you need one. I want you know that although your father is gone, memories cannot be taken away from you. Hold on to the memories you share together and always smile because he will be smiling down at you and expecting to get a smile back. I love you and I hope you know that you have other people people who love you so much.

2.details:
Childhood friend
Memories from our childhood
Our secret handshake
Playing together during weekend and after school
Having a catchup session with you
Remembered love for dancing and singing
Missing you a lot
2.model_generation:
Hey old friend,

I hope life’s been treating you well. I’ve been thinking about our secret handshake lately and can’t help smiling at how proud we were of inventing it. Remember those afternoons after school, when we’d race to the park and spend hours dreaming up new adventures? Weekends felt endless as we built forts, chased each other through the backyard, and laughed until our sides hurt. I still think about our impromptu dance parties in the living room—our shared love of singing and dancing was unstoppable!

It’s been too long since we caught up, and I miss you more than ever. Let’s plan a catch-up session soon—coffee, a walk in the park, or even a Zoom night where we can revive that handshake on camera. I can’t wait to hear what you’ve been up to and share more memories.

Missing you loads and hoping to see you soon.

Warmly,
2.final_version:
Hey old friend,

I hope life’s been treating you well. I’ve been thinking about our secret handshake lately and can’t help smiling at how proud we were of inventing it. Remember those afternoons after school, when we’d race to the park and spend hours dreaming up new adventures and talking about our plans for the future? Weekends felt endless as we played board games, chased each other through the backyard, and laughed until our sides hurt. I still think about our impromptu dance parties in the living room and our shared love of singing and dancing was unstoppable! Remember the videos we used to record?

It’s been too long since we caught up, and I miss you more than ever. Let’s plan a catch-up session soon a movie, a walk in the park, or even a WhatsApp video call night where we can revive that handshake on camera. I can’t wait to hear what you’ve been up to and share more memories.

Missing you loads and hoping to see you soon.

Warmly,

3.details:
Dearest friend
Thanks for giving me support when I lost my father
I really appreciate your efforts at comforting me
You have become family to me
I feel blessed to have you
3.model_generation:
Dearest Friend,

I cannot thank you enough for standing by me during the hardest time of my life. When I lost my father, your kindness, patience, and comforting words brought light into my darkest days. Your visits, heartfelt messages, and thoughtful gestures provided the strength I needed to keep moving forward. You listened without judgment, offered hugs when I felt too broken to speak, and reminded me that I was not alone. Your presence felt like family, filling the void left by my loss with warmth and love. I am deeply grateful for every effort you made to console me and honor my father’s memory. Having you in my life is a precious gift, and I feel truly blessed to call you my friend. I look forward to creating new memories with you as I heal and grow. Thank you for being my rock and for showing me the true meaning of friendship.

With love and gratitude,

Your friend
3.final_version:
Dearest Friend,

I cannot thank you enough for standing by me during the hardest time of my life. You told me that you will always be there for you, and you meant it. I have never needed you in my life like I did during this difficult time. When I lost my father, your kindness, patience, and comforting words brought light into my darkest days. Sometimes I even forgot about my loss because you made sure thst you keep my mind aways from thinking about it. Your visits, heartfelt messages, and thoughtful gestures provided the strength I needed to keep moving forward. You listened without judgment, offered hugs when I felt too broken to speak, and reminded me that I was not alone. Your presence felt like family, filling the void left by my loss with warmth and love. I am deeply grateful for every effort you made to console me and honour my father’s memory. Having you in my life is a precious gift, and I feel truly blessed to call you, my friend. I look forward to creating new memories with you as I heal and grow. I am proud of you and blessed to have been given such a friend like you. Thank you for being my rock and for showing me the true meaning of friendship.

With love and gratitude,

Your friend

4.details:
We have been together for 5 years
I am so blessed to have a thoughtful, considerate and kind partner like you
I wish nothing will break our bond
What we share is special
I can't wait to sleep and wake up next to you
4.model_generation: My love, these past five years together have been the greatest gift of my life. Every moment with you has shown me what it means to be truly seen, deeply understood, and unconditionally loved. I cherish the laughter we share and the quiet moments we treasure. Your thoughtfulness, your gentle heart, and your unwavering kindness inspire me to be the best version of myself. Today I vow to honor and protect the special bond we share, to nurture our connection with patience, respect, and devotion. I promise to stand by your side through every joy and every challenge, to celebrate your triumphs and comfort you in sorrow. I will laugh with you, dream with you, and grow with you, committed to the life we are building together. I can't wait to fall asleep and wake up next to you, today and every day. With all my heart, I choose you, now and forever.
4.final_version: My love, these past five years together have been the greatest gift of my life. Every moment with you has shown me what it means to be truly seen, deeply understood, and unconditionally loved. I cherish the laughter we share and the quiet moments we treasure. I feel loved every moment and I am oozing with gratitude to God for blessing me abundantly because that is what having you feels like. Your thoughtfulness, your gentle heart, and your unwavering kindness inspire me to be the best version of myself. Today I vow to honour and protect the special bond we share, to nurture our connection with patience, respect, and devotion. I promise to stand by your side through every joy and every challenge, to celebrate your triumphs and comfort you in sorrow. I will laugh with you, dream with you, and grow with you, committed to the life we are building together. I can't wait to fall asleep while looking at your handsome face and wake up next to you, today and every day. With all my heart, I choose you, now and forever.

5.details:
My best friend
I am truly sorry for what happened
I did not mean for things to escalate that way
Please find it in your heart to forgive me
I hope we an get through this
5.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I am writing to say how deeply sorry I am for what happened. I never intended for things to escalate the way they did. When we disagreed, I let my frustration get the better of me, and I reacted in a way that hurt you and damaged the trust we share. You mean so much to me, and I regret that my actions caused you pain.

Please know that my apology is sincere. I take full responsibility for my part and recognize how my words and behavior fell short. I hope you can find it in your heart to forgive me. Our friendship has always been a source of joy and support, and I truly value every moment we spend together.

I hope we can get past this and move forward, stronger and closer than before. Thank you for considering my apology.

Sincerely,
Your friend
5.final_version:
Dear Friend,

I am writing to say how deeply sorry I am for what happened. I never intended for things to escalate the way they did. When we disagreed, I let my frustration get the better of me, and I reacted in a way that hurt you and damaged the trust we share. You mean so much to me, and I regret that my actions caused you pain. I know that some words I said cannot be easily forgotten but I pray that you will forgive and forget.

Please know that my apology is sincere. I take full responsibility for my part and recognize how my words and behaviour fell short. I hope you can find it in your heart to forgive me. Our friendship has always been a source of joy and support, and I truly value every moment we spend together. I would be so shattered if I lose this friendship over a little argument that we had

I hope we can get past this and move forward, stronger and closer than before. Thank you for considering my apology. I miss you so much and you ignoring me has been such a torture.

Sincerely,
Your friend
